cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out where Eve is playing at the end of the match after all the swaps. Let me start by writing down the initial positions of each player. Original assignments: - Alice: fullback - Bob: center midfielder - Claire: right midfielder - Dave: left winger - Eve: goalkeeper Now, there are several swaps mentioned. Let me go through each one step by step. First swap: Dave and Eve trade positions. So after this, Dave becomes goalkeeper and Eve becomes left winger. Let me note that down: After first swap: - Alice: fullback - Bob: center midfielder - Claire: right midfielder - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: left winger Second swap: Claire and Bob trade positions. So Bob moves to right midfielder and Claire moves to center midfielder. After second swap: - Alice: fullback - Bob: right midfielder - Claire: center midfielder - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: left winger Third swap: Alice and Bob trade positions. Now Alice becomes right midfielder and Bob becomes fullback. After third swap: - Alice: right midfielder - Bob: fullback - Claire: center midfielder - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: left winger Fourth swap: Eve and Dave trade positions again. So Eve goes back to goalkeeper and Dave becomes left winger. After fourth swap: - Alice: right midfielder - Bob: fullback - Claire: center midfielder - Dave: left winger - Eve: goalkeeper Fifth swap: Bob and Alice trade positions. Bob is currently fullback and Alice is right midfielder. After swapping, Bob becomes right midfielder and Alice becomes fullback. After fifth swap: - Alice: fullback - Bob: right midfielder - Claire: center midfielder - Dave: left winger - Eve: goalkeeper Wait, so at the end of all swaps, Eve is back to goalkeeper? But let me double-check each step to make sure I didn't make a mistake. First swap: Dave (left winger) and Eve (goalkeeper) switch. So Dave is goalkeeper, Eve is left winger. Correct. Second swap: Claire (right midfielder) and Bob (center midfielder) switch. Now Bob is right midfielder, Claire is center midfielder. Correct. Third swap: Alice (fullback) and Bob (right midfielder) switch. Alice becomes right midfielder, Bob becomes fullback. Correct. Fourth swap: Eve (left winger) and Dave (goalkeeper) switch back. Now Eve is goalkeeper, Dave is left winger. Correct. Fifth
